skillName: Angles in a triangle sum to 180°
misconceptionSummary: Students confuse the angle sum of a triangle (180°) with the angle sum around a point (360°).

lines.text: Triangle with angles 80° and 60° — find the third
220° is reflex — impossible inside a triangle

steps.narration: The student used three hundred and sixty and got two hundred and twenty degrees — a reflex angle. That is impossible inside a triangle. Every interior angle of a triangle must be less than one hundred and eighty, and the three must be less than that combined. Three hundred and sixty is the wrong total.

visuals.ruleText: Triangle interior angles → 180°.  Angles around a full point → 360°.
visuals.subText: A triangle has three angles forming a closed shape — they meet at three separate vertices, not one

steps.narration: Three hundred and sixty applies when all angles meet at a single point and go all the way around. A triangle's three angles are at three different vertices — they do not go around a single point. The three-corner tearoff shows they form a straight line, not a full turn.

lines.text: Check: all three less than 180°, sum = 180°  ✓

steps.narration: Correct equation: eighty plus sixty plus x equals one hundred and eighty. X equals forty degrees. Check: forty is acute — perfectly valid inside a triangle. Sum: eighty plus sixty plus forty is one hundred and eighty.

visuals.label: Triangle → 180°, not 360°.  No interior angle can exceed 180°.

steps.narration: Forty degrees. Triangle angles sum to one hundred and eighty — always. Any answer greater than one hundred and eighty for a triangle interior angle signals an error.

misconceptionStrip.text: Common mistake: 360° − 80° − 60° = 220° for a triangle angle. Triangle interior angles sum to 180°. A result over 180° is impossible inside a triangle — use 180° − 80° − 60° = 40°.
misconceptionStrip.audioNarration: Triangle angles sum to 180°, not 360°. 360° is for angles around a full point. No interior angle of a triangle can be reflex — if your answer is over 180°, you used the wrong total.
